title: Algerian Oat Hash
description: A hearty North African-inspired breakfast dish featuring a crispy oat and vegetable hash, topped with a fried egg.
instructions: In a large pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the hash and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the oats, cumin, coriander, salt, and pepper. Cook, stirring frequently, for 5 minutes.
Using a spatula, press the mixture down to form a flat layer.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the oats are lightly browned.
Crack an egg into a small bowl and season with salt and pepper.
Pour the egg over the oat mixture and cook until the whites are set, about 2-3 minutes.
Use a spatula to break the yolk and fold the egg into the oat mixture.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
